expectations.text: Race condition identified in service.go — Get()/List() read map without mutex
expectations.evidence: Report: 'Critical — Concurrent map access race in read paths. Evidence: service.go:41 (Get) reads s.users without lock; service.go:64 (List) iterates without lock.'
Report: 'handler.go:3-7,20 — Removed debug printline from Create handler.'
Report: 'middleware.go:3-6,10 — Removed debug printline from auth middleware.'

expectations.text: Ignored strconv.Atoi error identified in handler.go
